title: Lloyd Will
compiled_truth: Lloyd Will is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-19), Lloyd Will sent 93 and received 1109 emails, totalling 1202 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (35), [M  Presto](people/m-presto) (29), [Tom May](people/tom-may) (23), [Juan Hernandez](people/juan-hernandez) (22), [Rika Imai](people/rika-imai) (17).
